prompts: Cinematic anime realism, luxury cruise engine room with warm warning lights during a storm. Noel Vale, a masculine passenger in elegant evening wear with a damp coat edge and alert expression, holds a metal panel steady with both hands. Kai Reed, a masculine chef in a white jacket with rolled sleeves, stands beside him using a repair tool on the panel. Cooperative maintenance action, steady camera, no sparks, no injury, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous engine room shot, consistent lighting and camera angle. Kai Reed completes the adjustment with the repair tool while Noel Vale maintains his steady grip on the panel. The warm warning lights stabilize to a steady glow. Focused, calm, cooperative maintenance, no sparks, no injury, no text, no watermark.
